title: rubus costatus
intro: Rubus costatus, also known as the African raspberry or wild raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Rubus costatus include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of various phytochemicals such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus costatus include its potential to help reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus costatus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
